case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. CORA KING-LITTLEFIELD et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KING-LITTLEFIELD, CORA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT KING-LITTLEFIELD, CORA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (ENDORSED COPY IN DEPT. 206)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $3.30 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING-LITTLEFIELD, CORA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 14 HARBOR ROAD SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDING ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES . SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KING-LITTLEFIELD, CORA
